column2: The beard made him appear like a rugged wild man, and yet all post-Everest-Base-Camp hiker Mason Sheppard desired was a long bath and a mani-pedi.
'Let them eat cake,' said a resigned Regina Guzman, even knowing that the next hour or two, although it wouldn't cause a peasant revolt, would still send fifteen kids into a sugar rush and crash.
Kimberly Mays rolled the dice and went with her gut on the foreign menu. She spent the next three days bringing her battered and bruised gut back online.
Judith Higgins had always joked about having a second stomach for dessert, but it was surprising to everyone, including the medical community, that it was, in fact, fact.
Roots of ageism had been sown early in Grant Woodard, beginning at school, whereby the Year 6 kids always got the choice of best spots in the playground for recess and lunch.

It was all about balance. Having used his limbs to excess in the last several days thanks to his mountain trek, the only logical next step was to lie like a coma patient and binge one of the many medical dramas on Netflix.

The complications in Kael Hale's life seemed to recede from the lens of his focus as he examined the curly straw that had come with his cocktail. This comic drink delivery device had, for a moment, removed him from himself.
When his date deliberately attempted to straighten the curly straw staked in her cocktail, Jackson Delacruz felt his optimistic erection begin to fade.

Unfortunately for Camille French, there was nothing in her tool-belt to help her deal with this particular tool of a first date. Yet another occurrence when she wished she was Batman with his deus ex machina utility belt.

Wesley Yelsely had forgotten to download podcasts in preparation for his long, reception-less bus ride, but it wouldn't be a problem. The schizophrenic voices in his head would perform a similar, distracting role.
Goddamn, Trevor Nelson felt like a kid again. With the curly straw coming out of his Fanta, curly fries and chicken nuggets lying in a basket in front of him, he was bathing in nostalgia.
The denim jeans looked beyond repair, but Nina Kyle knew better. She treated them to a few hours of country music from her stereo; the next day they were as good as new.

Tyler Plyer was left wracked with guilt after his roof racks, carrying a delivery of more roof racks, fell off his van and caused the crash of a butcher's truck, laden with racks of ribs. The driver, who incidentally had a massive rack, was still in intensive care.
Janet Oar ran a home delivery service. That is, for homesick clients, she provided food and other creature comforts that reminded them of home.
One of Alissa's creature comforts was giving her creature (in the form of dog Heidi) comfort.
To mix things up in his kitchen, Harold was a big proponent of the whisk; to mix things up in his life, he was a big believer in an obliterating bender.
Willow wondered why the obnoxiously named 'Road King' truck had paid the road toll like everyone else. It was either a humble monarch or a false king.
Rashi's body was a temple, and as such she charged tithes via her OnlyFans.
Ricky's body was a temple, and yet he was finding it hard to attract any worshippers.
True to form, the people who had no respect for lines thought that bollards were also bollocks, and ignored them accordingly.
Bra straps, bag straps, knee-strapping, strapping young husband; Haleigh Wright was one supported woman.
Dana had reserved the reserved table, as she didn't want too much interaction in the restaurant tonight.
It was a day out for the poor family. They sent their youngest child into the museum on the cheapest fare, and he spent the rest of the day taking photos of everything to show to the family later.
Ageing Danielle took stock of the animal taxidermies at the museum and had a humorous idea for her own funeral one day.
Nessie sought therapy for her retail therapy, which had recently gotten out of hand.
The way Cassian's daughter was mindlessly flailing her limbs was his best indicator yet as to how bored she was at the museum.
Agent M, previous champion wakeboarder, never got bored of water-boarding, which made him useful to his superiors and a horror to the prisoners.
It was sometime during the peeling and deveining of a hundred tiger prawns that Brian de Vrom discovered the true meaning of Christmas.
Karissa Boyer thought that the toothpick she was idly twirling around her mouth only made her look cool, but her dentist also remarked at her next checkup that she had healthier gums, too.
Cassie had no willpower when it came to horsepower. Lucky for her, business was going well, though she was running out of garage space for her growing number of supercars.
